creator: milki@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Alexander Moisseev from comment #8)
> Created attachment 146728 [details]
> patch created against sysutils/backuppc
> 
> https://redports.org/buildarchive/20140903122933-83042/

Great. Looks like https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=192403 is resolved. I'll need to review the diff from the bug to understand how patch-configure and patch-update solve the issue.

wg, since you committed the patch to backuppc-devel, feel free to take this if you want.
